hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"test"' package.json; then npm test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python -m pytest 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then go test ./... 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"test"' package.json; then npm test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python -m pytest 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then go test ./... 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // .input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"test"' package.json; then npm test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python -m pytest 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then go test ./... 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // .input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"test"' package.json; then npm test 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"permission":"deny","userMessage":"Tests failed — fix before committing"}'; exit 0; fi; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python -m pytest 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"permission":"deny","userMessage":"Tests failed — fix before committing"}'; exit 0; fi; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo test 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"permission":"deny","userMessage":"Tests failed — fix before committing"}'; exit 0; fi; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then go test ./... 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"permission":"deny","userMessage":"Tests failed — fix before committing"}'; exit 0; fi; fi; fi; echo '{}'; exit 0
